channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bulls celebrate final Loftus game for Ruan Nortje and Kurt-Lee Arendse with emphatic win over Munster
item.description: The Bulls secured a dominant 45-14 victory over Munster at Loftus Versfeld, booking their place in the United Rugby Championship semi-finals against the Warriors in Glasgow on June 6. Bulls captain Ma...

item.title: Delta Central Youths to Benefit from Rigging and Scaffolding Skills Training
item.description: Senator Ede Dafinone for Delta Central join hands with Nigerian Content Development and Monitoring Board (NCDMB) don launch three-week skills training programme for youths. The training go focus on ri...

item.title: Strong Buyer Demand Continues in Canberra Despite Lower Auction Clearance Rates
item.description: Canberra's property market continues to attract solid buyer interest across a range of price points, although a mismatch between vendor and purchaser price expectations is limiting completed sales. Au...

item.title: Trump criticizes court ruling over Kennedy Center name removal and withdraws support for project
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump reacted strongly after a federal judge ordered his name removed from the Kennedy Center building and blocked a proposed temporary closure tied to renovation plans. I...

item.title: Hawaii Congressional Candidate Kirill Basin Charged After Allegedly Threatening County Employees With a Firearm
item.description: Kirill Basin, a Democratic candidate for Congress in Hawaii, was arrested and charged with Terroristic Threatening in the First Degree following an incident at a Maui County government building. Accor...

item.title: Wisconsin Democrats test socialist-style economic populism in a swing state
item.description: The article examines how democratic socialism and broader economic populism are becoming a bigger force in Wisconsin politics ahead of the 2026 midterms. It focuses on Francesca Hong, a progressive ca...

item.title: Oyo APC Leaders Officially Present Sharafadeen Alli and Senatorial Candidates to President Tinubu
item.description: Leaders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Oyo State have formally introduced Sharafadeen Alli to President Bola Tinubu as the party’s governorship candidate, bringing an end to months of specu...

item.title: A Gospel Reflection on Living and Loving Through the Word
item.description: The article titled “A Word on the Word: A lesson on living and loving” is a faith-based reflection written by Fr. Raymund Benedict “RB” Hizon, SJ, published under ABS-CBN Lifestyle. It presents a spir...

item.title: Sonic Boom Over New England Likely Caused by Meteor
item.description: On Saturday afternoon, residents across Massachusetts and wider New England reported a loud boom that shook homes and sparked concern. Police departments received numerous calls about the mysterious s...

item.title: CCM Announces Strict Accountability Measures for Underperforming Members
item.description: Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM), the ruling party in Tanzania, has clearly stated that it will no longer tolerate laziness among its members, regardless of their rank or public popularity. The party leaders...

item.title: Confidential documents raise questions over handling of Lucy Letby case amid allegations of workplace conflict
item.description: Confidential internal documents from the Countess of Chester Hospital have intensified debate surrounding the case of Lucy Letby, the neonatal nurse convicted of murdering seven babies and attempting ...

item.title: Debate over abortion stance by Georgia GOP candidate sparks concerns about electoral impact
item.description: Former Republican Congressman Joe Walsh criticized Georgia Lt. Gov. Burt Jones after a resurfaced video appeared to show Jones supporting a total abortion ban during a past GOP debate. The footage, re...

item.title: Experts Warn DOJ Actions Could Undermine State Bar Oversight
item.description: Legal experts and journalists are raising concerns over recent actions by the U.S. Department of Justice under Acting Attorney Todd Blanche. According to reporting by Adam Klasfeld, Blanche has allege...

item.title: Walking the Chemin de Saint Jacques: France’s historic Camino route through medieval villages
item.description: The article explores the Chemin de Saint Jacques in France, part of the broader Camino de Santiago pilgrimage route that has existed since the 10th century. The writer, an avid traveller and walker, d...

item.title: Thugs attack PDP faction meeting in Abuja after Jonathan’s 2027 candidacy ratification
item.description: Serious tension show for Abuja on Saturday as suspected thugs scatter one faction of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) meeting shortly after them don ratify former President Goodluck Jonathan as thei...

item.title: Former ‘Badjao Girl’ Viral Sensation Rita Gaviola Marries Longtime Partner
item.description: The ABS-CBN Entertainment article reports that Rita Gaviola, widely known to the public as “Badjao Girl,” is now married. Gaviola first gained national attention after photographs of her taken during ...

item.title: ANC Women’s League appoints interim leadership amid disciplinary process against president
item.description: The African National Congress Women’s League (ANCWL) has placed its president, Sisisi Tolashe, on temporary removal from active duties while disciplinary proceedings against her are underway. Followin...

item.title: PSG defend Champions League crown after penalty shoot-out win against Arsenal
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain successfully defended their UEFA Champions League title after edging Arsenal 4-3 on penalties following a tense 1-1 draw in the final at the Puskas Arena. The match began with Arse...

item.title: Trump endorses Republican governor candidates in South Carolina, Iowa, and Oklahoma
item.description: President Donald Trump intervened in three contested Republican gubernatorial primaries by endorsing candidates in South Carolina, Iowa, and Oklahoma. In a series of social media posts, he backed Sout...

item.title: Newly discovered fungus offers natural control against invasive moss threatening UK habitats
item.description: Scientists in Britain have identified a previously unknown species of fungus that appears to selectively infect and kill the invasive heath-star moss, raising hopes for the recovery of damaged native ...
